description: Written by /init to ~/.claude/roambee-config.json. All fields are optional until the feature that needs them is first used.

accountId.description: AWS account ID owning the CodeArtifact domain

profile.description: AWS CLI profile name, e.g. default

keyEnvVar.description: Name of the env var holding the API key, e.g. OPENROUTER_API_KEY

memory.description: Shared team memory store used by /remember and /recall

backend.description: Storage backend. 'local' = markdown files + optional git sync. 'graphify' = POST/GET to graphify/hindsight API.

store.description: Local directory for memory files. Used when backend=local.

remote.description: Git remote URL for team sync (e.g. git@github.com:Roambee/team-memory.git). Optional — if set, /remember pushes and /recall pulls automatically.

endpoint.description: Base URL of the graphify/hindsight API. Required when backend=graphify.
